revision.comment: The border is hideous when smaller, and although I see the intent of the border, it just doesn't work well.
moved [[Template:Country data Russian Federation]] to [[Template:Country data Russia]] over redirect: matches name of main Wikipedia article ([[Russia]])
use MediaWiki border syntax in parent flag templates instead of alternate SVG images using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
transition complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
use new documentation method - still in sandbox, but testing almost complete
